name: appendix-h-generator
description: Static browser app that turns SMS cross-section output into Appendix H charts and a Word document.

scripts.test:node: node test/run.mjs && node test/matching.mjs && node test/history.mjs && node test/report.mjs && node test/trim.mjs && node test/e2e.mjs && node test/culvert_shapes.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:ui
